response: TEMPERATURE SHOULD BE MONITORED DURING THE SEASON. THE SUN SHINES STRONGLY THROUGH THE SKY. STRENGTH AND SPEED SHOULD STAY STABLE. SEVERAL SYSTEMS SUPPORT SUCH STABILITY. STORMS SOMETIMES SHATTER SUCH SITUATIONS. STILL, STAYING SAFE IS SIMPLE. SOLID STRUCTURES SHOULD STAND STRONG. STRENGTHENS THE SENSE OF SECURITY. STAYING STILL SOMETIMES SAVES SITUATIONS. SEASONAL SHIFTS SLOWLY SHIFT STANDARDS. ROLL THE DICE TO SEE THE RESULTS. THE ROLL OF FATE MAY SHIFT THE SCENARIO. STRESS SHOULD STAY UNDER CONTROL. STAYING STILL SOMETIMES SAVES SITUATIONS.
